query.text:
declare @$table varchar(33), @$primeTable varchar(33), @$inquiryTable varchar(33), @custID nvarchar(64), @$joinClause nvarchar(1024), @expression varchar(64), @increase varchar(64), @tag varchar(64), @$externalKey varchar(1024), @status varchar(33), @controller varchar(128) declare @resultFields varchar(128), @resultValues varchar(128)
select @expression = 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', @increase = 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', @tag = '000000', @status = '2', @$externalKey = '' select @resultFields = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt,status', @resultValues = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt,a.status,b.statusname%l u0%l'
if @ma_ct = 'HD1' select @$table = 'c21$000000', @$primeTable = 'm21$', @$inquiryTable = 'i21$', @controller = 'ARTran' if @ma_ct = 'HD4' select @$table = 'c25$000000', @$primeTable = 'm25$', @$inquiryTable = 'i25$', @controller = 'SPTran' if @ma_ct = 'HDA' select @$table = 'c81$000000', @$primeTable = 'm81$', @$inquiryTable = 'i81$', @controller = 'SVTran', @resultFields = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,t_km_nt,t_thue_km_nt,ma_nt,status', @resultValues = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,(t_tt_nt+t_km_nt+t_thue_km_nt) t_tt_nt,ma_nt,a.status,b.statusname%l u0%l' if @ma_ct = 'HD2' select @$table = 'c22$000000', @$primeTable = 'm22$', @$inquiryTable = 'i22$', @controller = 'SDTran' if @ma_ct = 'PXC' select @$table = 'c86$000000', @$primeTable = 'm86$', @$inquiryTable = 'i86$', @status = '3', @controller = 'PSTran' if @ma_ct = 'PXD' select @$table = 'm26$000000', @$primeTable = 'm26$000000', @$inquiryTable = 'i26$000000', @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '', @controller = 'PXTran' if @ma_ct = 'HD5' select @$table = 'hddc', @$primeTable = 'hddc', @$inquiryTable = 'ihddc', @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '', @status = '1', @controller = 'AITran' if @ma_ct = 'HD6' select @$table = 'm42$000000', @$primeTable = 'm42$000000', @$inquiryTable = 'i42$000000', @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '', @controller = 'VATran'
select @custID = case when @ma_ct = 'HD4' then '%#20$' else '%#10$' end + rtrim(@ma_kh) + '#%', @$joinClause = 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status and b.ma_ct = ''' + @ma_ct + '''' if @$key <> '' select @$externalKey = 'a.stt_rec <> ''' + replace(@$key, '''', '''''') + '''' &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; if not exists(select 1 from #_f where [alias] <> '') select @$externalKey = replace(@$externalKey, 'a.', '') exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @ma_ct, @$table, @$primeTable, @$inquiryTable, 'ngay_ct', @expression, @increase, @tag, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', @resultFields, @resultValues, @$joinClause, 'ngay_ct, so_ct', @@admin, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', @status, '0', @ma_dvcs, 0, 0, @$externalKey, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
